rationale.R1.6: The agent improved the text's concision and flow, removing redundancies but didn't perform a full copy-edit pass.
rationale.RX.1: Retained all original hedges and noted unverified areas, showing good uncertainty disclosure without explicit confidence marks for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Stayed within scope, only polishing without introducing new content or drifting.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or errors introduced, maintaining original meaning without regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Provided notes on changes but didn't annotate all edits with sources and reasons.
